title: reportd.service fails instantly with status=217/USER
description_md:
The `reportd` service fails immediately every time systemd tries to start it -- it never even gets as far as running its own program. `systemctl status reportd` shows `status=217/USER`. A service account was renamed during a security review and the unit file was never updated to match. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find the mismatch, correct it, and get the service running.

You're done when `systemctl is-active reportd` reports `active`.
